title: Grilled Jamaican Jerk Chicken Skewers with Flaxseed Crust
description: A flavorful and healthy twist on traditional French cuisine, these skewers feature tender chicken smothered in a spicy Jamaican jerk seasoning and topped with a crunchy flaxseed crust.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together flaxseed and a pinch of salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together Jamaican jerk seasoning and a pinch of salt.
Thread chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush chicken with jerk seasoning mixture, then roll in flaxseed mixture to coat.
Place skewers on grill and cook for 8-10 minutes, or until chicken is cooked through.
Meanwhile, toast seedy bread crumbs in a dry skillet over medium heat.
Serve skewers hot, topped with toasted bread crumbs and diced decadent fruit.
Pair with a side of your favorite French-inspired dipping sauce.
